item.command:
/usr/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,220p' tests/fixtures/orchestration-smoke-output-contract.json
if [ -e data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-budgeted-candidate-2026-06-23.json ]; then
  printf '\\nEXISTS data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-budgeted-candidate-2026-06-23.json\\n'
else
  printf '\\nMISSING data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-budgeted-candidate-2026-06-23.json\\n'
fi
if [ -e data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-candidate-2026-06-22.json ]; then
  printf 'EXISTS data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-candidate-2026-06-22.json\\n'
else
  printf 'MISSING data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-candidate-2026-06-22.json\\n'
fi"

/usr/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,220p' tests/fixtures/orchestration-smoke-output-contract.json
if [ -e data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-budgeted-candidate-2026-06-23.json ]; then
  printf '\\nEXISTS data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-budgeted-candidate-2026-06-23.json\\n'
else
  printf '\\nMISSING data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-budgeted-candidate-2026-06-23.json\\n'
fi
if [ -e data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-candidate-2026-06-22.json ]; then
  printf 'EXISTS data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-candidate-2026-06-22.json\\n'
else
  printf 'MISSING data/candidate-changes/orchestration-smoke-candidate-2026-06-22.json\\n'
fi"

/usr/bin/zsh -lc 'set -e
npm run validate:records
npm run audit:references
npm run audit:agent-schemas
npm run audit:orchestration-smoke-contract
npm run audit:agentic-process'

/usr/bin/zsh -lc 'set -e
npm run validate:records
npm run audit:references
npm run audit:agent-schemas
npm run audit:orchestration-smoke-contract
npm run audit:agentic-process'
